center.name: Dampier Peninsula
center.summary: Dampier Peninsula是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Chestnut-backed buttonquail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Native to northern Australia, the species ranges from the Dampier Peninsula in Western Australia across to Westmoreland Station in the Gulf Country of northwestern Queensland, with possible records from Gregory Downs and Augustus Downs further east

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Native to northern Australia, the species ranges from the Dampier Peninsula in Western Australia across to Westmoreland Station in the Gulf Country of northwestern Queensland, with possible records from Gregory Downs and Augustus Downs further east
